jobDescription: We’re looking for a senior conceptual writer to join our global creative team. Ideas-y. Strategic thinking. Highly conceptual. Strong team player. Confident coming up with big campaigns, writing and overseeing work across the channels, art directing (in tandem with a designer), presenting, mentoring juniors and managing stakeholders. MOO is a creative printer for creative professionals and businesses. We’re best known for Business Cards but premium print is our bag. We’re growing fast in the US and worldwide, with a global HQ in London ( UK), a US head office in Boston and offices in Providence and Denver. And we’re still growing... Fun, fast-paced, creative thinking and decidedly uncorporate – full of diversely talented and genuinely lovely people. You’ll be part of a 20-strong team of creatives (designers, art directors, writers, photographers, artworkers and studio managers), reporting into our Head of Copy and helping to shape the content we create both on and offline. The Must Haves: Distinctly different writing style, full of observational humour and insight Natural flair for our MOO tone of voice: clear, confident, genuine, witty, warm Proven experience writing and delivering cross-channel, integrated campaigns including OOH, online advertising, social, email, video and events Comfortable working in close collaboration with a designer partner/team to develop ideas that are cohesive from a visual and copy perspective Strong stakeholder management skills – you know how to answer a brief and challenge how we think to get the best possible creative answer Excellent project and deadline management skills, you’re a self-starter and team player (no egos round here!) The nice-to-haves: You’ll have a diverse mix of B2 C/ B2 B and lifestyle brands in your portfolio Advertising experience (especially digital) in an agency environment E-commerce experience with a like brand in an in-house environment Fluent in US and UK language to ensure we’re (localizing – er, localising) Experience managing freelancers and/or juniors MOO WHO? We set out to shake up the world of print back in 2006. And we’ve come a long way since. Today we’re a 500-strong team (we’re thinking of getting matching jackets) who create print and digital products for companies of all sizes – from Google and Air Bn B to the guy who makes those amazing prints you found at a craft fair. Our global HQ is in London, UK, while we also have premises in Dagenham. In the US, you’ll find us in Boston, MA, as well as Providence and Lincoln, RI and Denver, CO. And we’re still growing! That’s where you come in. What’s it like to work at MOO? MOO’s a workplace where you can be yourself. Dye your hair purple. Take your laptop to the sofa. Whatever helps you feel comfortable and happy at work. We want to do whatever we can to help you grow in your career (and make enough space for a fulfilling home life too).
